name: hpca-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for HPCA, the IEEE International Symposium on High-Performance Computer Architecture: venue fit in the four-venue architecture calendar, the mid-summer abstract+paper gate, simulation- and silicon-grade evaluation, double-blind review with a single rebuttal/revision window, IEEE-badged artifact evaluation, and the February/March conference. Grounded in HPCA 2026/2027 official pages checked on 2026-07-09.
